title: The Haunting Legacy of the Flat Rock Triple Murder

scenes.text: Three lives lost in a tragic murder case that still haunts a community.
The tragedy occurred in Flat Rock, North Carolina, leaving behind a chilling legacy.
In 2004, three residents were brutally murdered, shocking the peaceful community.
Years later, the case remains unresolved, and memories linger in every corner.
The community grapples with unanswered questions and lingering fears.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED TRAGEDY

scenes.text: Follow if you can't stop asking why.

description: 📍 North Carolina, USA - 2004. Three residents were tragically murdered, casting a shadow over the Flat Rock community. The case remains unsolved, and fear lingers. Follow for daily mysteries!
